div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: depends_on: Delegates payment authorization. catalog: payment authorization is requested, checkout is active

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: depends_on: Sends high-risk review notification. catalog: support agent is notified, payment review is pending, support agent

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: depends_on: Returns decline outcome for customer messaging. catalog: payment is declined, decline reason

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: depends_on: Returns temporary unavailable response when bank link is down. catalog: bank link is unavailable

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: depends_on: Requests fraud scoring. catalog: fraud check is enabled, risk score is high, risk score

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: depends_on: Calls bank authorization API. catalog: bank link is available, payment authorization is requested
